focus_points: Review the bounded RR-AUTH-04 clean-baseline packet only for verification debt, evidence drift, waiver quality, promotion debt, and closure drift.
Treat the reopened debt-elimination ledger as part of the authority packet and determine whether any meaningful verification debt still remains after the fresh fail-first evidence and reruns.
Do not mistake approved backend-only browser waivers for debt unless the package fails to justify them.
Do not reopen unrelated product or architecture redesign outside the bounded RR-AUTH-04 slice.
For each material finding, include category and formalizable-hint when they can be judged honestly.
goal: Fresh RR-AUTH-04 verification-debt review after debt-elimination reopen. Decide whether any explicit verification debt or closure drift still survives on the bounded baseline. Findings first. JSON only.
